domain_archetypes.name: durate evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: durate signal changes while marketing context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: marketing boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: marketing handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: leans regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: leans behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: plain operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: plain output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
